description: Steph Strings is a multi-instrumentalist who tells a story through her music. With influences from the John Butler Trio, Tash Sultana and Ziggy Alberts, this multi-instrumentalist entails bursts of percussion alongside Celtic, blues and coastal fingerstyle indie-rock. 2020 saw Steph perform an incredible sold out show at Melbourne’s iconic Chapel off Chapel venue, as well perform shows with The Pierce Brothers, Kim Churchill, Ash Grunwald and many more. Steph is a uniquely gifted, emerging talent that is a must see.
title: Steph Strings Concert
